properties.NAM: Thatched earthen hut in the lagoon of Valencia
properties.DESC: The Aranda family barraca is an earthen construction with a rectangular floor plan and a pitched thatched roof and chimney. The Aranda traditional thatched earthen hut is one of the few remaining historic Valencian huts located in the village of El Palma

properties.NAM: The Impluvium house of the Bandial kingdom
